StateMachine.name: Demo3
StateMachine.description: Demo FSM that configures pose values on the C++ writer state before serializing and reading them.

Param.name: pose_x
Param.description: Pose position x component written by PoseWriterState.

Param.name: pose_y
Param.description: Pose position y component written by PoseWriterState.

Param.name: pose_z
Param.description: Pose position z component written by PoseWriterState.

Param.name: pose_orientation_w
Param.description: Pose orientation w component written by PoseWriterState.

Key.name: pose_bytes
Key.description: Serialized Pose message stored as bytes in the blackboard.

Key.name: pose_bytes__type
Key.description: Type information for the serialized Pose message.
